title: How a man of God leads when it costs him
caption:
Real leadership has nothing to do with who's in charge.

It has everything to do with who goes first into the cost.

First to apologize — even when you were only half wrong. First to absorb the hit without announcing what you gave up. First to say "that was on me" before anyone else names it. First to your knees before you pick up a strategy.

Christ didn't earn authority by demanding it. He got there by leading people through death first. Your calls are smaller. The shape is exactly the same.

"Whoever would be great among you must be your servant." — Matthew 20:26

Tag the man who leads like this.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #christianity #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
